key_insights.insight: Creating personal boundaries and routines is crucial for mental well-being, especially during periods of isolation or change.
key_insights.quote: It was like creating your own boundaries, creating your own routines. And that's where I think everybody struggled the most without routine.

key_insights.insight: Toxic productivity, the need to always be doing something productive, can be detrimental to one's mental health.
key_insights.quote: If I'm not doing something that's productive, I feel like I'm going backwards, so then I'm trying to make I'm trying to force moves.

key_insights.insight: Acknowledging the potential downsides of alcohol and developing a healthier lifestyle can significantly improve one's self-esteem and overall well-being.
key_insights.quote: You can't train and drink and anything. You can't do it all at once.

key_insights.insight: In the face of public scrutiny, focus on the honesty of negative comments; if it hurts, there is likely truth to it.
key_insights.quote: I think you know the things that hurt you the most because you know they're honest so when someone says something you like if they hurt you then you hurt you a lot then you know there's some truth in it because it hurt you.

key_insights.insight: It's important to take control of one's own life and make choices that serve oneself rather than constantly trying to please others.
key_insights.quote: Until I started to do that with my life, i was living for everybody else and i'm a complete people pleaser anyway so it was like nothing in my life was about serving myself which then that just put me in a bad place.

key_insights.insight: Entering fame at a young age can stunt emotional development and lead to challenges in adulthood.
key_insights.quote: Someone told me something about fame: you enter fame the age you leave fame the age you entered it, so for me that was 14 right so I'm screwed like I'm a 14 year old forever child.

key_insights.insight: In relationships, avoid presenting a false version of yourself and instead be honest about your needs and preferences from the beginning.
key_insights.quote: So when it comes down to relationships, I'm always trying to, at the start of the relationship, as we all do, you put out this complete false character.

key_insights.insight: For creativity to flourish, it is necessary to get out of your own way and be free from self-criticism.
key_insights.quote: It's all about getting out your own way and I feel like now I feel much more like I know who I am and I know what I want to do so I don't need to be in my own way.

key_insights.insight: Money provides care, the ability to relax and help those around you.
key_insights.quote: Money is is care and the ability to relax on certain things life's gonna kick you in that nut sometimes and you're gonna need something to help those around you.

actionable_advice.advice: If feeling overwhelmed by negative comments, write a note to that person as a letter and then delete it without sending.
actionable_advice.how_to: Pop open your notes app and write a letter then delete it

actionable_advice.advice: Slowly build up a gym routine, don't go too hard too fast
actionable_advice.how_to: Start with 15-20 minutes of activity and slowly build it up to an hour or more

actionable_advice.advice: To begin mindful practices, close your eyes, and pick two senses of which you can choose like feel to ground yourself into the moment.
actionable_advice.how_to: Start by noticing what you can smell and then what you can feel

memorable_stories: Being in McDonald's after losing X Factor fame and someone called him a reject
Breaking into every major stadium in America
First AA meeting was at Russell Brand's house and Brand was doing stand up at an AA meeting
contrarian_claims: To truly design characters, you need to base them on existing animals or traits, instead of starting from scratch.
You need to throw out the window the idea of not basing yourself on others because you learn from people who are your heroes.
You're not really ever going to top your first fame or heights, so there's that mountain and then it's almost like limbo.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Liam Payne Opens Up About His Darkest Moments, Failed Relationships & Entrepreneurship
